title: botrychium virginianum var. cicutarium
intro: Botrychium virginianum var. cicutarium, also known as rattlesnake fern, is a rare and unique species of fern found in North America. The rattlesnake fern is considered to have medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots being traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the rattlesnake fern is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or salve to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing pain and promoting wound healing.
